zh.lifeSummary: 當Princess Agnieszka of Liegnitz Boleslawowna於1246年出生在波蘭多爾諾希利a斯吉萊瓦福時，她的父親Bolesław II Rogatka Piast22歲，母親Hedwig von Anhalt27歲。她和Conde Ulrich von Württemberg I至少有2個兒子和3個女兒。她去世於1265年3月13日在德國巴登-爾特波格斯圖特加特享年19歲，埋葬在德國巴登-爾特波格斯圖特加特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Princess Agnieszka of Liegnitz Boleslawowna于1246年出生在波兰多爾諾希利a斯吉萊瓦福时，她的父亲Bolesław II Rogatka Piast22岁，母亲Hedwig von Anhalt27岁。她和Conde Ulrich von Württemberg I至少有2个儿子和3个女儿。她去世于1265年3月13日在德国巴登-爾特波格斯圖特加特享年19岁，埋葬在德国巴登-爾特波格斯圖特加特。

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese: Cheng, Jing, Kam Fung, Wai Shing, Wing, Yali, Yuk.
variant Romanization of the surnames 歐 and 區, see   Ou   1 and 2.

variants.name: Ou
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Wei, Ying, Ching, Heng, Hong, Jia, Kuang Yu, Li-Ching, Cho, Chong, Chung, Sa.  Southeast Asian Lichun, Ming, Quan, Roeun, Sokhom, Chau, Hai, Leang, Ly, Nhanh, Phan, Pho, Tha.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 歐, meaning ‘to sing someone's praise’ in ancient Chinese: (i) from the placename Dong Ou (東甌), a fief (in present-day Wenzhou in Zhejiang province) which was granted to Yao in 192  BC . It is said that Yao was a descendant of Wujiang (reigned 355–333  BC ), king of the state of Yue (located mainly in present-day Zhejiang and Jiangxi provinces) during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ). (ii) from the placename Ou Yu (歐餘), the name of a fief (located in present-day Zhejiang province) that was granted to Ti, the second son of Wujiang (reigned 355–333  BC ), king of the state of Yue (located mainly in present-day Zhejiang and Jiangxi provinces) during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ).

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 區, originally denoting an ancient vessel for measurement in ancient Chinese: from the personal name of Ou Zhizi (歐治子), an expert sword-maker who lived during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476 BC ). Some of his descendants inherited Ou (歐) as their surname, simplifying the Chinese character 歐 to 區.

nameMeanings.name: Agnieszka
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

en.lifeSummary: When Princess Agnieszka of Liegnitz Boleslawowna was born in 1246, in Wrocław, Lower Silesia, Poland, her father, Bolesław II Rogatka Piast, was 22 and her mother, Hedwig von Anhalt, was 27. She had at least 2 sons and 3 daughters with Conde Ulrich von Württemberg I. She died on 13 March 1265, in Stuttgart, Baden-Württemberg, Germany, at the age of 19, and was buried in Stuttgart, Baden-Württemberg, Germany.

fr.Wuerttemberg, Germany: Rod am Berg, Neu-Anspach, Hochtaunuskreis, Hessen, Allemagne
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Princess Agnieszka of Liegnitz Boleslawowna est née en 1246, à Wrocław, dolnośląskie, Pologne, son père, Bolesław II Rogatka Piast, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Hedwig von Anhalt, avait 27 ans. Elle a eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles avec Conde Ulrich von Württemberg I. Elle est décédée le 13 mars 1265, à Stuttgart, Baden-Württemberg, Allemagne, à l’âge de 19 ans, et a été enterrée à Stuttgart, Baden-Württemberg, Allemagne.

de.Wuerttemberg, Germany: Rod am Berg, Neu-Anspach, Hochtaunuskreis, Hessen, Deutschland
de.lifeSummary: Als Princess Agnieszka of Liegnitz Boleslawowna 1246 in Wrocław, Niederschlesien, Polen geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Bolesław II Rogatka Piast 22 und ihre Mutter Hedwig von Anhalt 27. Sie hatte mit Conde Ulrich von Württemberg I mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 13. März 1265 im Alter von 19 Jahren in Stuttgart, Baden-Württemberg, Deutschland und wurde in Stuttgart, Baden-Württemberg, Deutschland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Princess Agnieszka of Liegnitz Boleslawowna è nata il nel 1246 nel Wrocław, dolnośląskie, Polonia, sua padre, Bolesław II Rogatka Piast, aveva 22 anni e sua madre, Hedwig von Anhalt, aveva 27 anni. Lei avuto almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie con Conde Ulrich von Württemberg I. Morì il 13 marzo 1265, nel Stuttgart, Baden-Württemberg, Germania, all'età di 19 anni, e fu sepolta a Stuttgart, Baden-Württemberg, Germania.

ko.lifeSummary: Princess Agnieszka of Liegnitz Boleslawowna(이)가 1246년 폴란드 도노sa스키 록l아w에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Bolesław II Rogatka Piast(은)는 22세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Hedwig von Anhalt(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 Conde Ulrich von Württemberg I(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1265년 3월 13일 독일 바데-wu르테버그 스투트가트에서 19세의 나이로 사망했으며 독일 바데-wu르테버그 스투트가트에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Princess Agnieszka of Liegnitz Boleslawowna родилась в 1246 г. в местности рокlав, долноsлaски, Польша, её отцу по имени Bolesław II Rogatka Piast было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Hedwig von Anhalt, 27. У неё было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери от Conde Ulrich von Württemberg I. Она умерла 13 марта 1265 г. в местности стуттгарт, баден-вuрттембирг, Германия в возрасте 19 лет и была похоронена в местности стуттгарт, баден-вuрттембирг, Германия.
